controlNotes: The ProFX10v3 has a 3-band EQ on mic/line channels: High shelf (12kHz), Mid sweep (100Hz–8kHz), Low shelf (80Hz). The Mid band is fully sweepable with a separate frequency knob. HPF (Low Cut) is a switch at 100Hz on each channel. Boost/cut range is +/-15dB for all bands.

instructionTemplates.openEQ: Find the 3-band EQ section on CH {channel}: High, Mid (with sweep), and Low knobs
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Press the LOW CUT switch on CH {channel} to engage the 100Hz HPF
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Turn the {band} frequency knob to approximately {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: No save needed — analog settings are retained by knob position
